Thicket of cherry-sized red plums on bushes at southern end of Oakmont Park. The park is also home to more wild plum thickets if you venture onto the dirt trails behind the main, mowed park area.

Large thicket of cherry-sized, red-to-yellow wild plums. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
4484 Bryant Irvin Rd #104, Fort Worth, TX 76132, USA
Hanging off the retaining wall Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
